811.description: When you defeat an enemy, they explode.

814.description: Squid use this ink to confuse would-be predators.

815.description: The young leaves of the tea plant. Can be brewed into the popular, energizing beverage.

267.description: It lives on the bottom, so both eyes are on top of its head.

73.description: To the parrots of Ginger Island, this nut is the finest delicacy.

867.description: It has more buttons than a regular remote. Perfect for the avid TV watcher!

868.description: This shard glows with an otherworldly blue light.

872.description: Sprinkle on kegs, furnaces, and other refining equipment to instantly receive their product.

874.description: The last resort of the hungry cave diver.

875.description: A thick, slimy goop that the Wizard wants for some reason.

887.description: The top of the ring is made from enchanted purple wool.

888.description: Emits a constant light, and also increases your radius for collecting items.

890.description: Plant these in any season. Water every day to produce a Qi Fruit. Takes 4 days to mature.

892.description: Warp to Qi's Arena. Be prepared for a challenge!.

894.description: An old tradition for celebrations and festivities. Handle with care!

898.description: He hatched in the warm summer water, and followed in the footsteps of his father.

899.description: Uses a bioluminescent dangler to attract prey.

900.description: The successor to the original Legend.

901.description: A carp that spent one too many years in toxic sludge.

902.description: The original Glacierfish had a son...

903.description: A zesty soda known for its soothing effect on the stomach.

904.description: A creamy dessert with a wonderful tropical flavor.

905.description: Sweet mango and coconut transforms this rice into something very special.

906.description: A traditional food with a delicate, sweet flavor when eaten fresh.

907.description: An exotic, fragrant curry served in a pineapple bowl.

909.description: It's glowing with dangerous energy... Can be smelted into bars.

910.description: Known by the Zuzu City Safety Commission to cause irreversible bodily harm.

911.description: Playing this flute will summon your horse. Only works outdoors.

913.description: Place on a sprinkler and load with fertilizer to automatically apply it when planting seeds nearby.

915.description: Place on a sprinkler to increase its watering range.

917.description: Just a dash will elevate any dish to extraordinary heights. Automatically applied when cooking.

918.description: Greatly stimulates leaf production. Guaranteed to increase growth rate by at least 33%. Mix into tilled soil.

919.description: Greatly improves soil quality, increasing your chance to grow quality crops. Mix into tilled soil.

920.description: This soil has a 100% chance of staying watered overnight. Mix into tilled soil.

925.description: Use this to transport a domesticated slime to another location.

926.description: Use this to create a cooking campfire, allowing you to cook on-the-go!

927.description: This allows you to cook anywhere, and is not consumed on use.

929.description: A shaped bush that acts like a fence.

FarAwayStone.description: A stone of unknown origins. Looks like it could be placed into something.

MysteryBox.description: A blacksmith can open this for you. Who knows what might be inside?

TroutDerbyTag.description: Turn this in to the Trout Derby booth for a reward.

DeluxeBait.description: Causes fish to bite even faster and increases size of the "fishing bar".

Moss.description: A special type of plant that grows in shady areas.

MossySeed.description: This can be planted to grow rare wild trees.

SonarBobber.description: Shows what fish is on the line before it's caught.

TentKit.description: Use this to deploy a one-time-use tent for sleeping. Can only be used outdoors.

VolcanoGoldNode.description: Break apart to obtain gold ore.

MysticTreeSeed.description: This can be planted to grow a special tree.

MysticSyrup.description: A very rare syrup that is said to have magic properties.

Raisins.description: It's said to be the Junimos' favorite food.

StardropTea.description: A very special gift that would delight anyone.

PrizeTicket.description: Bring this to the prize machine in Lewis' house for a special reward.

TreasureTotem.description: Use on diggable terrain to summon a ring of treasure spots.

ChallengeBait.description: A "perfect" catch yields triple the fish. However, each time a fish escapes the "fishing bar", the catch is reduced.

CarrotSeeds.description: Plant in the spring. Takes 3 days to grow.

Carrot.description: A fast-growing, colorful tuber that makes for a great snack.

SummerSquashSeeds.description: Plant in the summer. Takes 6 days to grow, and continues to produce after first harvest.

SummerSquash.description: A curved yellow squash that is harvested while immature, and still tender.

BroccoliSeeds.description: Plant in the fall. Takes 8 days to mature, and continues to produce after first harvest.

Broccoli.description: The flowering head of a broccoli plant. The tiny buds give it a unique texture.

PowdermelonSeeds.description: This special melon grows in the winter. Takes 7 days to grow.

Powdermelon.description: Named for the powdery coating that forms on the surface, this melon is crisp and sweet, with a delicate flavor.

SeedSpot.description: How did you get this in your inventory?

PurpleBook.description: Read this to gain some experience in all skills.

SkillBook_0.description: Read this to gain some farming experience.

SkillBook_2.description: Read this to gain some foraging experience.

SkillBook_1.description: Read this to gain some fishing experience.

SkillBook_3.description: Read this to gain some mining experience.

SkillBook_4.description: Read this to gain some combat experience.

Book_Trash.description: You have a greater chance to find items in the trash.

Book_Crabbing.description: Crab pots have a 25% chance to yield double.

Book_Bombs.description: Bombs deal 25% less damage to you.

Book_Roe.description: Fishing treasure chests have a chance to yield roe.

Book_WildSeeds.description: Weeds have a greater chance to yield mixed seeds.

Book_Woodcutting.description: Felled trees have a 5% chance to yield double the wood.

Book_Defense.displayName: Jack Be Nimble, Jack Be Thick

Book_Friendship.description: You become friends with people a little faster.

Book_Void.description: Monsters have a small chance to drop double loot.

Book_Speed.description: You run a little bit faster.

Book_Marlon.description: You get a 50% discount on Marlon's item retrieval service.

Book_PriceCatalogue.description: You can now see the value of your items.

Book_QueenOfSauce.description: Learn any Queen Of Sauce recipes that you don't already know.

Book_Diamonds.description: All stones have a chance to drop a diamond when mined by hand.

Book_Mystery.description: You have a slightly greater chance to find Mystery Boxes.

Book_AnimalCatalogue.description: You can access Marnie's shop when she's not around.

Book_Speed2.description: You run a little bit faster.

GoldenAnimalCracker.description: Give this to a farm animal to permanently double its produce yield. Doesn't work on pigs.

GoldenMysteryBox.description: A blacksmith can open this for you. Who knows what might be inside?

SeaJelly.description: A rare jelly found in the ocean.

CaveJelly.description: A rare jelly found in underground lakes.

RiverJelly.description: A rare jelly found in freshwater.

Goby.description: Some types of Gobies can climb up waterfalls.

VolcanoCoalNode0.description: Break apart to obtain stone with a chance of coal.

VolcanoCoalNode1.description: Break apart to obtain stone with a chance of coal.

PotOfGold.description: Break apart to obtain stone with a chance of coal.

Book_Artifact.description: You will fetch a better price when selling artifacts.

Book_Horse.description: You gain a little extra speed when riding a horse.

ButterflyPowder.description: Sprinkle on a pet to remove them from your farm. The process is irreversible.

PetLicense.description: Invite a new pet into your home. If you don't have enough outdoor pet bowls for your pets, they will become upset.

BlueGrassStarter.description: Place this on your farm to plant a clump of blue grass.

MossSoup.description: It's thick and slimy, but edible.

Book_Grass.description: You will now run a lot faster through grass and crops.
